critical_finding.title: Zero active strategies — system in monitoring-only mode
critical_finding.detail: All 14 strategies disabled after Hermes audit escalations (AUDIT-008/012/013/014/016/017). Engine producing 0 signals. System is effectively dormant — only data collection and monitoring active. No trading can occur until at least one strategy is rehabilitated and re-enabled.
critical_finding.recommendation: Priority: (1) Prometheus must re-validate TrendFollow_BTC with corrected parameters, (2) MLEnsemble needs feature engineering fix (add oracle features from oracle_features.py), (3) Consider enabling conservative TrendFollow_BTC_1h with reduced position size as baseline.
